mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_tbl B JOIN member_tbl M ON B.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO
B.BOARD_STATUS = 1
AND B.BOARD_CATEGORY = 1
AND B.BOARD_CATEGORY = 2
AND B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND M.MEMBER_NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')

SELECT B.BOARD_NO, B.BOARD_CATEGORY, B.BOARD_TITLE, B.BOARD_THUMB, B.BOARD_STATUS, DATE_FORMAT(B.BOARD_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS BOARD_DATE,
M.MEMBER_ID AS BOARD_WRITER, M.MEMBER_THUMB
FROM board_tbl B
JOIN member_tbl M ON B.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO
B.BOARD_STATUS = 1
AND B.BOARD_CATEGORY = 1
AND B.BOARD_CATEGORY = 2
AND B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND M.MEMBER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY B.BOARD_NO ASC
ORDER BY B.BOARD_NO DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT B.BOARD_NO, B.BOARD_TITLE, B.BOARD_STATUS, B.BOARD_VIEW, COUNT(DISTINCT L.MEMBER_NO) AS BOARD_LIKE, COUNT(DISTINCT C.BOARD_COMMENT_NO) AS BOARD_COMMENT, DATE_FORMAT(B.BOARD_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS BOARD_DATE FROM board_tbl B JOIN member_tbl M ON B.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN board_like_tbl L ON B.BOARD_NO = L.BOARD_NO LEFT JOIN board_comment_tbl C ON B.BOARD_NO = C.BOARD_NO
L.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
GROUP BY B.BOARD_NO
ORDER BY B.BOARD_NO DESC
ORDER BY B.BOARD_DATE DESC
ORDER BY B.BOARD_VIEW DESC
LIMIT #{request.offset}, #{request.size}

SELECT B.BOARD_NO, B.BOARD_TITLE, B.BOARD_STATUS, B.BOARD_VIEW, R.REPORT_STATUS, COUNT(DISTINCT L.MEMBER_NO) AS BOARD_LIKE, COUNT(DISTINCT C.BOARD_COMMENT_NO) AS BOARD_COMMENT, DATE_FORMAT(B.BOARD_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS BOARD_DATE FROM board_tbl B JOIN member_tbl M ON B.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN board_report_tbl R ON B.MEMBER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO LEFT JOIN board_like_tbl L ON B.BOARD_NO = L.BOARD_NO LEFT JOIN board_comment_tbl C ON B.BOARD_NO = C.BOARD_NO
L.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
GROUP BY B.BOARD_NO, R.REPORT_STATUS
ORDER BY B.BOARD_NO DESC
ORDER BY B.BOARD_DATE DESC
ORDER BY B.BOARD_VIEW DESC
LIMIT #{request.offset}, #{request.size}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_tbl ( MEMBER_NO, BOARD_CATEGORY, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_THUMB, PLACE_NO ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{boardCategory}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{boardThumb}, #{placeNo} )
mapper.update: UPDATE board_tbl SET BOARD_CATEGORY = #{boardCategory}, BOARD_TITLE = #{boardTitle}, BOARD_CONTENT = #{boardContent}, BOARD_THUMB = #{boardThumb} WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT B.BOARD_NO, B.MEMBER_NO, B.BOARD_CATEGORY, B.BOARD_TITLE, B.BOARD_CONTENT, B.BOARD_THUMB, B.BOARD_STATUS, DATE_FORMAT(B.BOARD_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS BOARD_DATE, B.PLACE_NO,
M.MEMBER_ID AS BOARD_WRITER, M.MEMBER_THUMB,
P.PLACE_NAME, P.ADDRESS_NAME, P.PLACE_LAT, P.PLACE_LNG
FROM board_tbl B
JOIN member_tbl M ON B.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO
JOIN board_place_tbl P ON B.PLACE_NO = P.PLACE_NO
WHERE B.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_place_tbl ( PLACE_NAME, ADDRESS_NAME, PLACE_LAT, PLACE_LNG ) VALUES ( #{placeName}, #{addressName}, #{placeLat}, #{placeLng} )
INSERT INTO board_report_tbl ( MEMBER_NO, BOARD_NO, REPORT_REASON, DETAIL ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{boardNo}, #{reportReason}, #{detail} )
mapper.select:
SELECT BC.BOARD_COMMENT_NO, BC.BOARD_COMMENT_CONTENT,
DATE_FORMAT( BC.BOARD_COMMENT_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS BOARD_COMMENT_DATE,
BC.BOARD_COMMENT_STATUS AS COMMENT_STATUS,
BC.MEMBER_NO AS MEMBER_NO,
M.MEMBER_ID AS BOARD_COMMENT_WRITER,
M.MEMBER_THUMB,
BC.BOARD_NO
FROM board_comment_tbl BC
JOIN member_tbl M ON BC.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO
WHERE BC.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND BC.BOARD_COMMENT_STATUS != 2
ORDER BY BC.BOARD_COMMENT_NO ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_comment_tbl ( BOARD_COMMENT_CONTENT, MEMBER_NO, BOARD_NO ) VALUES ( #{boardCommentContent}, #{memberNo}, #{boardNo} )
mapper.select:
SELECT BC.BOARD_COMMENT_NO, BC.BOARD_COMMENT_CONTENT,
DATE_FORMAT( BC.BOARD_COMMENT_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS BOARD_COMMENT_DATE,
BC.BOARD_COMMENT_STATUS AS COMMENT_STATUS,
BC.MEMBER_NO,
M.MEMBER_ID AS BOARD_COMMENT_WRITER,
M.MEMBER_THUMB,
BC.BOARD_NO
FROM board_comment_tbl BC
JOIN member_tbl M ON BC.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO
WHERE BC.BOARD_COMMENT_NO = #{boardCommentNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_comment_report_tbl ( MEMBER_NO, BOARD_COMMENT_NO, REPORT_REASON, DETAIL ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{boardCommentNo}, #{reportReason}, #{detail} )
